items.description: เทคอนกรีตทับหน้าหนา 5 ซม. Wire Mesh Ø 4 mm. @ 0.20 m.
งานเหล็กรูปพรรณ
ทาสีกันสนิม
รวมข้อ 1 หมวดงานโครงสร้าง

warnings: PNG contains two portrait sheets side by side rotated 90 degrees; this is the physical RIGHT half of the landscape scan (rotate 90 deg counter-clockwise to read), sheet 3/23, paired with sheet 4/23 extracted separately as _2.json.

First 5 rows are the direct continuation of item 1 หมวดงานโครงสร้าง started on page 79's sheet 2/23 (บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_02_หน้า79_2.json) - no sub-item numbers printed on any of these continuation rows either, consistent with that sheet.
Several blank ruled rows exist between 'ทาสีกันสนิม' and the 'รวมข้อ 1' subtotal row with no printed content - not an extraction gap, the form has more ruled rows than used line items.
doc_page=78 read directly from the printed page-number footer at the bottom of the original (unrotated) source PNG, consistent with the doc_page = png_page - 2 relationship established on page 79.
